mapper.insert: insert into users( email, password, name, phone, gender, role, nick_name, photo_name, login_id, kakao_id, naver_id ) values( #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{role}, #{nick_name}, #{photo_name}, #{login_id}, #{kakao_id}, #{naver_id} )
mapper.select: select * from users where name=#{name} and email=#{email}
select * from users where email=#{email} and phone=#{phone}
mapper.update: update users set password=#{newPwd} where user_id = #{user_id}
update users set role = 'SELLER' where user_id = #{user_id}
